message:
fix: use turboquant-wasm@0.3.0 from npm, remove Vite alias workaround

v0.3.0 is published with WebGPU support. Bump demo dep and remove
the source alias hack. Demo CI no longer needs to build from source.

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,6 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
     paths:
       - 'demo/**'
-      - 'src/**'
       - '.github/workflows/demo.yml'
   workflow_dispatch:
 
@@ -29,17 +28,10 @@ jobs:
         with:
           lfs: true
 
-      - uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
-        with:
-          version: 0.15.2
-
       - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
-      - name: Build WASM + JS package
-        run: bun run build
-
       - name: Install demo dependencies
         working-directory: demo
         run: bun install
